data.title: Palantir, Salesforce, Okta, Meta, And Tesla: Why These 5 Stocks Are On Investors' Radars Today
data.description: The U.S. stock markets were mixed on Tuesday, with the Dow Jones index dropping over 70 points.

data.title: South Korean Markets Plunge Amid Political Turmoil As President Yoon's Martial Law U-Turn Sparks Uncertainty: Samsung, SK Hynix, And Hyundai Stocks Tumble
data.description: South Korean markets traded sharply lower on Wednesday, Dec. 3, 2024 following a dramatic political upheaval that saw President Yoon Suk Yeol briefly impose and then quickly withdraw martial law after facing parliamentary opposition.

data.title: Bill Ackman Says Biden Is Handcuffing Trump And Musk's DOGE Plans By Locking In Work-From-Home Deals For Federal Employees: 'This Needs To Stop Now'
data.description: On Tuesday, Pershing Square Capital Management CEO Bill Ackman slammed what he said were attempts by the Biden administration to “make permanent the Deep State” in a post on X.

data.title: Trump's DEA Pick Withdraws From Consideration, Will Keep Job As Florida Sheriff
data.description: Trump's DEA nominee, Florida sheriff Chad Chronister, has withdrawn from consideration after backlash. His office faced criticism over immigration policies.

data.title: Diversify Around And Find Out: Can Vegas Superstore And Florida Sales Boost This Weed Penny Stock?
data.description: Is this 40-cent cannabis stock undervalued? Zuanic & Associates dives into its growth potential and market prospects.
